query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS atomic_tests (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  guid VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  technique_id VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  technique_name VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  test_name VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  supported_platforms VARCHAR(128),
  executor_type VARCHAR(64),
  executor_command TEXT,
  cleanup_command TEXT,
  elevation_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  input_arguments TEXT,
  dependencies TEXT,
  mitre_tactic VARCHAR(255),
  last_synced_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_technique_id (technique_id),
  INDEX idx_mitre_tactic (mitre_tactic),
  INDEX idx_executor_type (executor_type),
  INDEX idx_supported_platforms (supported_platforms)
);

  guid VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,

  elevation_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  input_arguments TEXT,
  dependencies TEXT,
  mitre_tactic VARCHAR(255),
  last_synced_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_technique_id (technique_id),
  INDEX idx_mitre_tactic (mitre_tactic),
  INDEX idx_executor_type (executor_type),
  INDEX idx_supported_platforms (supported_platforms)
);
